notes: Standard cursor was not visible. Player movement cursor was and when hovering over UI Buttons it was visible. The game is playable, but it is annoying to guess where the cursor is.
title: Jagged Alliance: Crossfire

notes: This game works but the cursor becomes invisible when you have a player selected. This is highly annoying and prevents me from playing comfortably.
title: Jagged Alliance: Crossfire

notes: Don't know whether the issues are from Proton/Wine, or just that the game sucks. The mouse cursor disappears when you select a character, which makes it difficult to control where you're going.
title: Jagged Alliance: Crossfire
